arts.ttl: Eddie Howe underlines one key word ahead of Newcastle United vs Nottingham Forest
arts.sum: Forest also head to Newcastle on the back of a defeat, after losing 2-1 at Fulham last weekend, but Howe knows that his team must stay open minded regardless of how the game unfolds. But the Toon boss has thrown down the gauntlet to his players give the crowd something to feed off after back to back home defeats in the Premier League at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: 'I played for Newcastle with Alan Shearer - he didn't speak to me for at least two weeks'
arts.sum: Craig Bellamy has explained that Alan Shearer didn't speak to him for around two weeks when Sir Bobby Robson brought him to Newcastle United in 2001

arts.ttl: Newcastle ‘interested in signing’ player heading for exit – Liverpool also in picture
arts.sum: Millonarios FC’s Neyser Villarreal has ended up on Liverpool and Newcastle United’s radar, according to claims from Colombia. Journalist Guillermo Arango has covered the Magpies’ desire to sign the 19-year-old for Saque Largo, relayed by Bolvaip in Colombia. The outlet states Liverpool have shown interest and are joined by Newcastle in the chase. arts.ttl: Newcastle United reveal 'transformative' £58m truth after Amanda Staveley hit out
arts.sum: Former Newcastle owner Amanda Staveley previously slammed a group of clubs for 'doing everything they can to make sure' that the Champions League places were available to as few sides as possible, but Nottingham Forest currently sit in third; Bournemouth have leapfrogged Chelsea into fifth; and Spurs and Manchester United are languishing in the bottom half. Newcastle have lost three of their last four league games, and were hammered 4-0 by Manchester City last week, but this could still be a momentous campaign if the Carabao Cup finalists rediscover the consistency that propelled them up the table last month.

arts.ttl: Newcastle’s £1.6bn decision: owners fly in to decide St James’ Park future
arts.sum: Saudis have viewed secret plans for renovation of iconic home or costly new-build and could give go-ahead in weeks They are early drafts and were circulated between only a chosen few but senior Newcastle United executives have been scrutinising architects’ drawings of both a Plan A and a Plan B. These currently secret documents relate to a potential redevelopment of St James’ Park and the possible construction of a 70,000-capacity stadium in nearby Leazes Park. The consensus is that the former option would take at least five years to complete and the latter a minimum of seven. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: How Newcastle United's 2025/26 squad could look as Eddie Howe drops double hint
arts.sum: There's every chance come next season Schar, Wilson, Lascelles, Gillespie and Ruddy all play bit-part roles at Newcastle - but Howe sees their contributions behind the scenes as vital given their professionalism. Dubravka has been a regular fixture in Howe's side this term - but only due to Nick Pope's injury issues, and at 36 will likely not be used as the club's No 1 beyond the summer.

arts.ttl: Report: Former Nottingham Forest chief could be set for sensational return to the PL with Everton
arts.sum: He did a good job at Forest...

arts.ttl: Journalist insists Newcastle are in talks for player – Hottest candidate but West Ham also in mix
arts.sum: West Ham United are also talking to Bayer Leverkusen star Victor Boniface but Newcastle United are leading the way for him. That’s according to journalist Christian Falk, who reports that Newcastle are out in front for the Nigerian at this moment in time.
